stemHtml: In transport aircraft equipped with retractable landing gear, there must be a clear indication to the pilot...

options.a: whenever the landing gear selector is not in the neutral position.
options.b: whenever the gear is erroneously selected to retract on the ground.
options.c: when gear selection is performed above the gear limit speed.
options.d: whenever the landing gear position is not consistent with landing gear selector lever position.
